meta.note: Demo of the FlowMCP Data Configurator. Sources, tools and counts are generated from the real FlowMCP v4 schemas (scripts/build-configurator-payload.mjs). Open Berlin data — free, nothing to buy. Export (download / copy) is coming soon.
meta.source: Memo 120/121 demo · flowmcp-schemas-private v4.0.0 · det-grading island projects/flowmcp/_grading

accessClasses.label: Free
accessClasses.hint: Ready to use — no sign-up, no key.

accessClasses.label: Needs key
accessClasses.hint: Register an API key with the provider.

accessClasses.label: Local
accessClasses.hint: Runs locally — needs install / a data file.

categories.name: Mobility & Transit
categories.desc: Public transit, sharing, rail, roads, charging.

sources.title: Berlin Club History (106 lost clubs)
sources.desc: Lost Berlin nightclubs — search by name, music and district.

tools.name: listClubs
tools.desc: List closed Berlin clubs from the dataset, optionally narrowed by a music style substring. Returns each club with name, district, music styles, active years, address, a short description and GPS coordinates. Without a filter it returns the whole catalogue (106 venues).

tools.name: searchClubs
tools.desc: Free-text search across the Berlin club dataset. The query is matched case-insensitively against the club name, address and historical description. Returns matching venues with full details and GPS coordinates.

tools.name: getClubsByDistrict
tools.desc: List closed Berlin clubs located in a specific district (Bezirk), e.g. "Mitte", "Kreuzberg" or "Friedrichshain". The district name is matched case-insensitively. Returns matching venues with full details and GPS coordinates.

sources.title: Berlin Events & Assemblies
sources.desc: Berlin street & folk festivals, Christmas markets, and officially registered assemblies/demos (police feed, daily).

tools.name: street_festivals
tools.desc: List all upcoming street- and folk-festivals in Berlin (Strassen- und Volksfeste) with district, date range, address and organizer from the Berlin.de open-data feed. Complementary to christmas_markets (seasonal markets). Keyless.

tools.name: christmas_markets
tools.desc: List all upcoming Christmas markets (Weihnachtsmaerkte) in Berlin with district, location, date range, organizer and opening hours from the Berlin.de open-data feed. Use street_festivals for year-round events. Keyless, seasonal coverage (Nov-Dec).

tools.name: police_assemblies
tools.desc: List all officially registered assemblies, demonstrations and rallies (Versammlungen / Aufzuege) in Berlin with date, time, topic, address and procession route from the Berlin police open-data feed. Useful for traffic planning and event-impact analysis. Keyless, updated daily.

sources.title: Berlin Crime Atlas
sources.desc: Crime statistics per district and sub-region.

tools.name: getDistrictStatistics
tools.desc: Get crime statistics for all 12 Berlin districts (Bezirke). Returns frequency rates (HZ, cases per 100,000 residents) and absolute case numbers for 17 crime categories across 10 years (2015-2024). Data is a static JSON file from the Berlin Kriminalitaetsatlas InstantAtlas application.

tools.name: getRegionStatistics
tools.desc: Get crime statistics for all 143 Berlin district regions (Bezirksregionen). Returns frequency rates (HZ, cases per 100,000 residents) and absolute case numbers for 17 crime categories across 10 years (2015-2024). Data is a static JSON file from the Berlin Kriminalitaetsatlas InstantAtlas application.

sources.title: Berlin Rent Index (WFS)
sources.desc: Residential location ratings from the Berlin rent index.

tools.name: getWohnlagen
tools.desc: Get residential area classifications for Berlin addresses. Filter by bounding box, district, street, postal code, or Wohnlage category via CQL. Returns address, classification, district, and coordinates.

tools.name: getWohnlageByAddress
tools.desc: Get the Wohnlage classification for a specific Berlin address. Provide a CQL filter with street name and house number (zero-padded to 3 digits, e.g. 001, 012, 077). Returns einfach, mittel, or gut.

sources.title: Berlin Solar Cadastre
sources.desc: Berlin solar cadastre (Solarkataster) — PV installations, installed capacity and solar potential per district.

tools.name: getSolarByDistrict
tools.desc: Get PV installation summary per Berlin district (Bezirk). Returns number of installations, installed capacity in MWp, and city-wide totals. 12 districts total.

tools.name: getSolarByPostalCode
tools.desc: Get PV installation summary per postal code (PLZ). Returns number of installations, installed capacity in kWp, and city-wide totals. About 190 postal code areas.

tools.name: getLargePvInstallations
tools.desc: Get individual large PV installations (over 30 kWp) in Berlin. Returns address, installed capacity, number of modules, orientation, feed-in type, commissioning date, and coordinates. About 1900 installations.

tools.name: getPublicPvInstallations
tools.desc: Get PV installations on public institution buildings in Berlin. Returns address, capacity, institution name, operator, contract type, green roof status, and commissioning year. About 1000 installations.

tools.name: getSolarPotentialByDistrict
tools.desc: Get theoretical PV potential per Berlin district. Returns total buildings, heritage building share, suitable roof area in million m2, and PV potential in MWp. 12 districts.

tools.name: getPvCoverageByDistrict
tools.desc: Get PV expansion coverage rate per Berlin district. Compares installed capacity against theoretical potential and shows the percentage of untapped solar potential. 12 districts.

sources.title: Berlin Procurement Notices
sources.desc: Current city-wide public procurement notices (Vergabeplattform, RSS). No district filter — Berlin-wide.

tools.name: getProcurementNotices
tools.desc: Get current public procurement notices from the Berlin Vergabeplattform. Returns tender announcements including title, description, link, and publication date.

sources.title: Berlin Geodata (WFS)
sources.desc: Berlin spatial layers — monuments, trees, fountains, graves, bathing water, events (WFS).

tools.name: natural_monuments
tools.desc: Berlin natural monuments (Naturdenkmale) — protected trees and glacial boulders (Findlinge) with their protection reason (schutzgrund). Returns a GeoJSON FeatureCollection. The full layer holds ~708 features; use count to limit. Source layer schutzgebiete:a_nd.

tools.name: war_victim_graves
tools.desc: Berlin burial sites of victims of war and tyranny (Opfer von Krieg und Gewaltherrschaft) — individual and mass graves per cemetery with cemetery name, denomination and address. Returns a GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Source layer okg:okg_1.

tools.name: drinking_fountains
tools.desc: Berlin public drinking-water fountains (Trinkbrunnen) with location, district (bezirk), build year and any current restrictions (einschraenkungen). Returns a GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Source layer trinkwasserbrunnen:trinkwasserbrunnen.

tools.name: street_trees
tools.desc: Berlin street trees (Strassenbaeume, ~625,000 features) with species (art_dtsch/art_bot), street name and location. The dataset is huge, so a bounding box is mandatory. bbox format minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat,EPSG:4326 (longitude first, WGS84). Central Berlin example: 13.37,52.51,13.40,52.52,EPSG:4326. Source layer baumbestand:strassenbaeume.

tools.name: planned_street_events
tools.desc: Berlin planned events in public street space (planbare Ereignisse) — construction sites and closures with start/end date, street, district and a severity rating. Returns a GeoJSON FeatureCollection (~7,435 features). Source layer planb_ereignisse:ereignisse.

tools.name: bathing_water_quality
tools.desc: Berlin bathing-water quality (Badegewaesser) from LAGeSo — the latest measurement per supervised bathing site (~39 lakes/rivers) with quality rating, water temperature and coordinates. Source is a German-locale CSV (semicolon-separated, comma decimal); this tool fetches and parses it into JSON. Optional district (bezirk) filter, case-insensitive substring match.

tools.name: dog_parks
tools.desc: All dog parks (Hundefreilauefe) in Berlin as GeoJSON FeatureCollection via Berlin.de.

tools.name: bbq_areas
tools.desc: All BBQ areas (Grillflaechen) in Berlin as GeoJSON FeatureCollection via Berlin.de.

tools.name: heritage_sites
tools.desc: List heritage sites (Denkmale) from the Berlin monument registry (Denkmalliste) as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection via Berlin.de. Returns monument id, type and database link. Use count to limit results and startIndex for pagination. The full dataset contains roughly 9,553 monuments.

tools.name: heritage_sites_by_type
tools.desc: Filter Berlin heritage sites by monument type using a CQL filter. Valid types: Baudenkmal (architectural monument), Gesamtanlage (complex), Gartendenkmal (garden monument), Ensemble (ensemble), Bodendenkmal (ground monument). Example CQL_FILTER: typ='Gartendenkmal'.

tools.name: heritage_sites_by_bbox
tools.desc: Get Berlin heritage sites within a geographic bounding box. Coordinates in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) as minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat,EPSG:4326. Central Berlin example: 13.37,52.51,13.40,52.52,EPSG:4326.

sources.title: Berlin Open Data Register (CKAN)
sources.desc: Discovery layer for the Berlin open-data portal — search datasets.

tools.name: searchDatasets
tools.desc: Full-text search for datasets in the Berlin open-data catalog. Returns matching datasets with title, name (slug), notes and resources.

tools.name: getDataset
tools.desc: Get full metadata for a single dataset by its name (slug) or id, including resources, tags, groups and organization.

tools.name: listCategories
tools.desc: List the thematic categories (CKAN groups) used to classify datasets in the Berlin open-data catalog.

tools.name: listOrganizations
tools.desc: List the publishing organizations (Berlin Senate departments, districts, agencies) that provide datasets in the catalog.

tools.name: listTags
tools.desc: List dataset tags, optionally filtered by a substring query. Useful to discover the keyword vocabulary used across Berlin datasets.

sources.title: Berlin Geodata Catalog (GDI)
sources.desc: Full-text search across 2,000+ official Berlin geodata records (GDI metadata catalog).

tools.name: searchCatalog
tools.desc: Full-text search the GDI Berlin geodata catalog and return the GeoNetwork JSON index. Use any for the search term across title, abstract and keywords (omit it to browse the whole catalog). Paging is controlled with from and to (1-based, inclusive). The response carries a summary block with the total match count plus a metadata array; each record exposes title, abstract, type, geoBox and a geonet:info.uuid usable with getRecordByUuid.

tools.name: listByType
tools.desc: List GDI Berlin catalog records filtered by resource type. The type parameter selects the GeoNetwork resource class: "dataset" for geodata datasets, "service" for OGC services, "service-download" for download (WFS/Atom) services and "service-view" for view (WMS) services. Paging is controlled with from and to (1-based, inclusive); the response uses the same GeoNetwork JSON index structure as searchCatalog.

tools.name: getRecordByUuid
tools.desc: Fetch a single GDI Berlin catalog record by its GeoNetwork uuid (the geonet:info.uuid value returned by searchCatalog or listByType). Returns the same GeoNetwork JSON index structure with a single metadata entry and a summary count of 1 when the uuid exists.

sources.title: Berlin Memorial Plaques
sources.desc: ~3,900 memorial plaques across Berlin — search by name and district.

tools.name: gedenktafelnSearch
tools.desc: Search Berlin memorial plaques by free text. Matches case-insensitively against name, dedication text, explanation, street and district. Returns up to "limit" plaques with corrected lat/lon coordinates.

tools.name: gedenktafelnByDistrict
tools.desc: List Berlin memorial plaques located in a given district (Ortsteil), matched case-insensitively (substring). Returns up to "limit" plaques with corrected lat/lon coordinates.

sources.title: IHK Berlin Business Data
sources.desc: 363k+ registered businesses — searchable.

tools.name: searchBusinesses
tools.desc: Search IHK Berlin registered businesses. Filter by Berlin district (Bezirk), registration type (Handelsregister vs Kleingewerbetreibender), employee-size range, and a free-text term matched against branch descriptions. Returns a paginated list of businesses with location, branch classification and district.

tools.name: listColumns
tools.desc: Return the column schema of the IHK Berlin Gewerbedaten CSV dataset: the raw header names and a short description of each field. Useful to discover which fields are available before searching.

tools.name: getStats
tools.desc: Return aggregate statistics for the IHK Berlin Gewerbedaten dataset: total business count and a breakdown of business counts per Berlin district (Bezirk), sorted by count.

sources.title: infraVelo Cycling
sources.desc: Berlin cycling-infrastructure projects by district.

tools.name: getAllProjects
tools.desc: Get all cycling infrastructure projects in Berlin as GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Includes bike lanes, parking, traffic signals with coordinates, status, district, and cost info. Use getProjectsByDistrict to filter by a specific Berlin district.

tools.name: getProjectsByDistrict
tools.desc: Get cycling infrastructure projects filtered by Berlin district (Bezirk). Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Use getAllProjects to see available district names.

sources.title: Kulturdaten Berlin
sources.desc: ~13k cultural events, attractions and venues across Berlin.

tools.name: listAttractions
tools.desc: List published cultural attractions (concerts, plays, lectures and other cultural happenings) in Berlin with pagination.

tools.name: getAttraction
tools.desc: Get a single cultural attraction by its identifier.

tools.name: listEvents
tools.desc: List published cultural events (an attraction taking place at a specific location and time) in Berlin with pagination.

tools.name: listLocations
tools.desc: List cultural venue locations (theatres, community centres, museums and other places) in Berlin with pagination.

tools.name: getLocation
tools.desc: Get a single cultural venue location by its identifier.

tools.name: listOrganizations
tools.desc: List cultural organizations (districts, institutions and other bodies that curate cultural data) in Berlin with pagination.

tools.name: getOrganization
tools.desc: Get a single cultural organization by its identifier.

sources.title: Berlin Funded Cultural Institutions
sources.desc: Publicly funded cultural institutions in Berlin — list, filter, search.

tools.name: listInstitutions
tools.desc: List all publicly funded cultural institutions in Berlin from the official Senate statistics file. Optionally limit the number of returned institutions. Each institution carries its address, coordinates, nearest stop with distance, nearest U/S-Bahn station, operator and category.

tools.name: filterByCategory
tools.desc: Return Berlin cultural institutions belonging to one top-level category (GruppeA). The readable category key is mapped to the German label used in the source file. Throws if the category is unknown — no silent default.

tools.name: searchByName
tools.desc: Find Berlin cultural institutions whose name contains a case-insensitive substring. Returns the matching institutions with full location and transport details.

sources.title: Berlin Air Quality (BLUME)
sources.desc: Berlin air-quality measuring network — stations and components.

tools.name: listStations
tools.desc: List all air-quality measurement stations of the Berlin network, including code, address, coordinates and measured components.

tools.name: getStation
tools.desc: Get detailed information for a single Berlin measurement station by its station code.

tools.name: listComponents
tools.desc: List all measurable components (pollutant plus aggregation period, e.g. pm10_1h) with unit, value range and description.

tools.name: listCores
tools.desc: List all pollutant cores (PM10, NO2, O3, etc.) with name, group, default period and available periods.

tools.name: getCore
tools.desc: Get detailed information for a single pollutant core by its code (e.g. pm10, no2, o3).

tools.name: getAirQualityIndex
tools.desc: Get the current air-quality index (Luftguete-Index) for all Berlin stations, including per-pollutant sub-indices and the measurement timestamp.

sources.title: museum-digital : Berlin
sources.desc: Berlin museum objects, institutions and collections (JSON API).

tools.name: listObjects
tools.desc: List the most recently catalogued museum objects across all Berlin institutions. Returns a flat array of object summaries (id, name, inventory number, capture date, holding institution, thumbnail).

tools.name: searchObjects
tools.desc: Full-text search for museum objects by a free-text term (matched against object names and metadata). Returns a flat array of matching object summaries with the same shape as listObjects.

tools.name: getObject
tools.desc: Retrieve the full detail record of a single museum object by its id: inventory number, type, name, description, material/technique, dimensions, holding institution, collections, related events and images.

tools.name: listInstitutions
tools.desc: List all Berlin museum institutions participating in museum-digital, including geographic coordinates and object/collection counts.

tools.name: getInstitution
tools.desc: Retrieve the detail record of a single museum institution by its id: name, ISIL, image, license and contact metadata.

tools.name: getCollection
tools.desc: Retrieve the detail record of a single collection by its id: name, description and object counts. Collection ids can be discovered via the holding institution metadata.

sources.title: Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf District Council
sources.desc: Council information — meetings, papers, members and agenda items — for Berlin Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf, via OParl (ALLRIS). Pick your district.

tools.name: getBodies
tools.desc: List the bodies (Koerperschaften) of a German council. Pick the council via the name enum; the vendor path style is resolved internally.

tools.name: getMeetings
tools.desc: List meetings (Sitzungen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, created/modified date filters. limit and reverse are applied client-side. The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.name: getMeeting
tools.desc: Get a single meeting (Sitzung) by id, including its agenda items. Requires the council name and the meeting id.

tools.name: getPapers
tools.desc: List papers (Drucksachen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getPaper
tools.desc: Get a single paper (Drucksache) by id, including reference, date and linked files. Requires the council name and the paper id.

tools.name: getPersons
tools.desc: List persons (members) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getOrganizations
tools.desc: List organizations (Gremien, Fraktionen, Dienststellen) of a council body, paginated. Filter the returned data by organizationType. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

sources.title: Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg District Council
sources.desc: Council information — meetings, papers, members and agenda items — for Berlin Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg, via OParl (ALLRIS). Pick your district.

tools.name: getBodies
tools.desc: List the bodies (Koerperschaften) of a German council. Pick the council via the name enum; the vendor path style is resolved internally.

tools.name: getMeetings
tools.desc: List meetings (Sitzungen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, created/modified date filters. limit and reverse are applied client-side. The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.name: getMeeting
tools.desc: Get a single meeting (Sitzung) by id, including its agenda items. Requires the council name and the meeting id.

tools.name: getPapers
tools.desc: List papers (Drucksachen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getPaper
tools.desc: Get a single paper (Drucksache) by id, including reference, date and linked files. Requires the council name and the paper id.

tools.name: getPersons
tools.desc: List persons (members) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getOrganizations
tools.desc: List organizations (Gremien, Fraktionen, Dienststellen) of a council body, paginated. Filter the returned data by organizationType. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

sources.desc: Council information — meetings, papers, members and agenda items — for Berlin Pankow, via OParl (ALLRIS). Pick your district.

tools.name: getMeetings

The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.desc: List organizations (Gremien, Fraktionen, Dienststellen) of a council body, paginated. Filter the returned data by organizationType. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

sources.title: Reinickendorf District Council
sources.desc: Council information — meetings, papers, members and agenda items — for Berlin Reinickendorf, via OParl (ALLRIS). Pick your district.

tools.name: getBodies
tools.desc: List the bodies (Koerperschaften) of a German council. Pick the council via the name enum; the vendor path style is resolved internally.

tools.name: getMeetings
tools.desc: List meetings (Sitzungen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, created/modified date filters. limit and reverse are applied client-side. The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.name: getMeeting
tools.desc: Get a single meeting (Sitzung) by id, including its agenda items. Requires the council name and the meeting id.

tools.name: getPapers
tools.desc: List papers (Drucksachen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getPaper
tools.desc: Get a single paper (Drucksache) by id, including reference, date and linked files. Requires the council name and the paper id.

tools.name: getPersons
tools.desc: List persons (members) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getOrganizations
tools.desc: List organizations (Gremien, Fraktionen, Dienststellen) of a council body, paginated. Filter the returned data by organizationType. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

sources.title: OpenStreetMap Berlin POIs
sources.desc: OSM points of interest in Berlin by category/tag (Overpass).

tools.name: findPoisByCategory
tools.desc: Find OSM points of interest in Berlin by a human-readable category preset. The bounding box defaults to the full Berlin extent and is given as GeoJSON order [minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat]; it is clamped to Berlin so queries cannot leave the city. Returns OSM elements with coordinates and tags.

tools.name: findPoisByTag
tools.desc: Find OSM points of interest in Berlin by an arbitrary OSM tag key/value (for example amenity=marketplace or artwork_type=statue). The bounding box is GeoJSON order [minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat], defaults to and is clamped to the Berlin extent. Returns OSM elements with coordinates and tags.

tools.name: countPoisByTag
tools.desc: Count OSM elements matching an OSM tag key/value inside a Berlin bounding box, without returning the full element list. Cheap way to size a category before fetching it. Bounding box is GeoJSON order [minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat], defaults to and clamped to the Berlin extent.

sources.title: Berlin SimpleSearch
sources.desc: Cross-portal search across berlin.de services.

tools.name: searchList
tools.desc: Full-text search a Berlin.de SimpleSearch list and return the tabular JSON index. The dataset parameter is the CMS path of the SimpleSearch application (the part between www.berlin.de and /index.php, no leading or trailing slash), e.g. "sen/web/service/maerkte-feste/weihnachtsmaerkte". Use q for the search term (empty string returns the full list); fields per row vary by dataset.

tools.name: searchGeo
tools.desc: Full-text search a Berlin.de SimpleSearch list and return the results as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of Point features. The dataset parameter is the CMS path of the SimpleSearch application (between www.berlin.de and /index.php, no leading or trailing slash). Only datasets that carry geographic coordinates yield non-empty features; use q to filter by free text (empty string returns the full list). Server-side spatial filtering is not supported.

sources.title: Stolpersteine Berlin
sources.desc: Memorial stones for victims of National Socialism — searchable by location.

tools.name: getAllStones
tools.desc: Get all Stolpersteine in Berlin. Returns the complete dataset. Use limit/offset for pagination.

tools.name: searchStones
tools.desc: Search Stolpersteine by person name or address. Filtering happens client-side on the full dataset.. Use IDs from results in getAllStones

tools.name: getStonesByDistrict
tools.desc: Get Stolpersteine in a specific Berlin district. Filtering happens client-side.. Use getAllStones first to find valid IDs

tools.name: getStonesByLocation
tools.desc: Get Stolpersteine near coordinates. Filtering by distance happens client-side.. Use getAllStones first to find valid IDs

sources.title: transport.rest VBB
sources.desc: Berlin & Brandenburg public transit (VBB) — stops, departures, journeys.

tools.name: searchLocations
tools.desc: Search for stops, stations, and addresses in the VBB network by name. Returns matching locations with coordinates, available transport products (S-Bahn, U-Bahn, tram, bus, ferry, regional), and station weight.

tools.name: getStop
tools.desc: Get detailed information about a specific stop/station by its VBB stop ID including name, coordinates, available products, and connected lines.. Use searchLocations first to find valid IDs

tools.name: getDepartures
tools.desc: Get real-time departures from a VBB stop/station. Returns scheduled and actual departure times, platform, line name, direction, delay, and transport mode for all VBB services.

tools.name: getArrivals
tools.desc: Get real-time arrivals at a VBB stop/station. Returns scheduled and actual arrival times, origin, platform, delay, and line information.

tools.name: getRadar
tools.desc: Get real-time positions of vehicles in a geographic bounding box. Returns active vehicles with their current coordinates, line info, and trip details. Only available for VBB network.. Use searchLocations first to find valid IDs

tools.name: getReachableFrom
tools.desc: Find stops reachable from a given location within a travel time limit. Requires address, latitude, and longitude. Returns stops grouped by travel duration.. Use searchLocations first to find valid IDs

tools.name: planJourney
tools.desc: Plan a journey between two VBB stops/stations. Returns journey options with legs, transfers, duration, and real-time delay information. Use stop IDs from searchLocations.

sources.title: transport.rest VBB Extended
sources.desc: Extended Berlin & Brandenburg transit — nearby stops, trip search, lines, route shapes and station autocomplete.

tools.name: getNearbyLocations
tools.desc: Find stops and stations near geographic coordinates. Returns nearby locations sorted by walking distance in meters.

tools.name: getTrip
tools.desc: Get detailed trip information including all stopovers, times, delays, and current position. Use tripId from departures or journey results.

tools.name: searchTrips
tools.desc: Search for currently running trips by line name, operator, or stop. Returns active vehicles with real-time positions and stopovers. VBB-exclusive endpoint.. Use IDs from results in getTrip

tools.name: searchStations
tools.desc: Autocomplete VBB station names using vbb-stations dataset. Returns richer data than /locations including address and facilities.

tools.name: getLines
tools.desc: Search and filter VBB transit lines by name, operator, or transport mode. Returns line details with route variants.. Use IDs from results in getLine

tools.name: getLine
tools.desc: Get detailed information about a specific transit line including all route variants with stop sequences.. Use searchTrips first to find valid IDs

tools.name: getShape
tools.desc: Get GeoJSON geographic shape data for a route. Use shape IDs from trip or line data for route visualization on maps.

sources.title: Autobahn Traffic
sources.desc: Roadworks, closures and traffic on the German Autobahn.

tools.name: listRoads
tools.desc: List all German motorway identifiers (A1, A2, …, A995) as known to the Autobahn-API. Use this once to discover valid road IDs, then pass them to traffic/incident/parking endpoints. Keyless, slow-changing — cache-friendly.

tools.name: getRoadworks
tools.desc: Get current roadworks and construction sites for a specific motorway. Required: roadId.

tools.name: getWarnings
tools.desc: Get current traffic warnings for a specific motorway via Autobahn API — query by roadId.

tools.name: getClosures
tools.desc: Get current road closures for a specific motorway via Autobahn API — query by roadId.

tools.name: getChargingStations
tools.desc: Get electric vehicle charging stations along a specific motorway. Required: roadId.

tools.name: getWebcams
tools.desc: Get traffic webcams along a specific motorway via Autobahn API — query by roadId.

sources.title: DESTATIS GENESIS
sources.desc: Federal statistics database — tables and indicators.

tools.name: search
tools.desc: Universal search across all DESTATIS data — returns matching statistics, tables, variables, and timeseries. Works without authentication (guest access). Use listTables for related data. Use listStatistics for related data.

tools.name: listTables
tools.desc: Browse available tables by code pattern (e.g. "12411*" for population tables). Requires authentication. Use search for related data. Use listStatistics for related data.

tools.name: listStatistics
tools.desc: Browse available statistics by code pattern (e.g. "124*" for population statistics). Requires authentication. Use search for related data. Use listTables for related data.

tools.name: getTableMetadata
tools.desc: Get detailed metadata for a specific table (description, variables, time range). Requires authentication. Use search for related data. Use listTables for related data.

tools.name: getStatisticMetadata
tools.desc: Get detailed metadata for a specific statistic (description, tables, variables). Requires authentication. Use search for related data. Use listTables for related data.

tools.name: getQualitySigns
tools.desc: Reference data for quality signs used in statistical tables (e.g. "/" = confidential, "..." = not yet available). Works without authentication. Use search for related data. Use listTables for related data.

tools.name: getTableData
tools.desc: Retrieve the actual data values of a specific GENESIS table as a flat CSV-like block with headers and values. Use startyear/endyear to limit the time range. Requires a GENESIS account credential. Use search for related data. Use getTablesForStatistic for related data.

tools.name: getTablesForStatistic
tools.desc: List all data tables belonging to a specific statistic code. Useful for discovering the available table breakdowns before retrieving data. Requires a GENESIS account credential. Use getTableData for related data. Use search for related data.

tools.name: catalogueVariables
tools.desc: Browse the variables (dimensions) of the GENESIS database. Variables define the axes of statistical tables such as year, region or age group. Requires a GENESIS account credential. Use getTableData for related data. Use search for related data.

sources.title: Federal Hospital Atlas
sources.desc: All German hospitals — searchable, with proximity.

tools.name: getAllHospitals
tools.desc: Get all hospital locations in Germany with pagination. Use limit/offset to page through ~1600 hospitals.

tools.name: searchHospitals
tools.desc: Search hospitals by name, city, or postal code. Filtering happens client-side on the full dataset. Equivalent to getHospitalsByCity when only city param is used.

tools.name: getHospitalsByCity
tools.desc: Get all hospitals in a specific city. Filtering happens client-side.

tools.name: getHospitalsNearby
tools.desc: Find hospitals near geographic coordinates within a radius. Filtering by distance happens client-side.

tools.name: getStateStatistics
tools.desc: Get healthcare statistics per federal state including case numbers, caregiver counts, and hospital counts. Small dataset (17 entries), returned in full. State names can be used as reference for city-based searches.

tools.name: searchIcdCodes
tools.desc: Search ICD diagnostic codes by code prefix or keyword in description. ICD codes classify diagnoses (e.g. I10 = hypertension). Use getIcdCode for exact code lookup.

tools.name: getIcdCode
tools.desc: Exact ICD code lookup. Returns the matching code and description. Use searchIcdCodes to discover valid codes first.

tools.name: searchOpsCodes
tools.desc: Search OPS procedure codes by code prefix or keyword in description. OPS codes classify medical procedures (e.g. 5-820 = hip replacement). Use getOpsCode for exact lookup.

tools.name: getOpsCode
tools.desc: Exact OPS code lookup. Returns the matching code and description. Use searchOpsCodes to discover valid codes first.

tools.name: searchPlaces
tools.desc: Search German places by city name, postal code prefix, or district. Filtering happens client-side on the full dataset (~82K entries). Use getGermanStates to discover valid state/district names.

tools.name: getPlaceByZip
tools.desc: Exact postal code lookup. Returns all places matching the 5-digit German postal code. This is a strict subset of searchPlaces with exact zip matching.

tools.name: getPlacesByDistrict
tools.desc: Get all places in a specific district (Landkreis). Filtering happens client-side. Use searchPlaces with district param for partial matches.

tools.name: getPlacesNearby
tools.desc: Find places near geographic coordinates within a radius. Filtering by distance happens client-side. Results are sorted by distance ascending.

tools.name: getGermanStates
tools.desc: Get all 16 German federal states with their geographic center coordinates. State names can be used as reference for district filtering in searchPlaces and getPlacesByDistrict.

sources.title: nextbike Bike-Sharing
sources.desc: Bike-sharing networks across 50+ German cities (GBFS).

tools.name: getStationsAndBikes
tools.desc: Get all stations and available bikes for a nextbike city/network. Returns station locations, capacity, available bikes by type, and individual bike details. Use city parameter for specific networks (e.g. 362 for Berlin). Get valid city IDs from getAllNetworks.

tools.name: getAllNetworks
tools.desc: Get a list of all nextbike networks/cities worldwide with summary statistics. Returns country, city names, available bikes count, and network metadata. No city parameter returns all networks. Optionally filter by ISO country code(s) via countries (e.g. DE, PL). Use returned uid values as city parameter in getStationsAndBikes.

sources.title: NINA Civil-Protection Alerts
sources.desc: Official hazard and weather warnings (BBK).

tools.name: getDashboard
tools.desc: Get active warnings for a specific German district by its AGS/ARS code (Amtlicher Gemeindeschlüssel). Returns all current alerts from all providers.

tools.name: getWarningById
tools.desc: Retrieve full details of a specific warning by its identifier. Returns CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) formatted warning with all areas and instructions.

tools.name: getMowasMapData
tools.desc: Get all active MoWaS (Modulares Warnsystem) warnings for the entire Germany map. Returns BBK civil protection warnings.

tools.name: getDwdMapData
tools.desc: Get all active DWD (Deutscher Wetterdienst) weather warnings for Germany. Returns severe weather alerts including storms, heavy rain, and snow.

tools.name: getKatwarnMapData
tools.desc: Get all active KATWARN warnings for Germany. Returns civil protection alerts from the KATWARN platform.

tools.name: getLhpMapData
tools.desc: Get all active LHP (Länderübergreifendes Hochwasser Portal) flood warnings for Germany. Returns river flood level alerts.

tools.name: getEventCodes
tools.desc: Retrieve the list of all available event codes used in NINA warnings. Useful for understanding warning categories and icons.

tools.name: getMowasWarnings
tools.desc: Get all current MOWAS (Modulares Warnsystem) official civil protection warnings across Germany. This is the nationwide channel that usually carries data; for warnings affecting a specific region use getRegionWarnings.

tools.name: getRegionWarnings
tools.desc: Get all active warnings affecting a specific region, identified by its 12-digit Amtlicher Regionalschluessel (ARS). The dashboard aggregates warnings from all providers (MOWAS, DWD, BIWAPP, KATWARN) for that district. Use the district-level ARS (state code + district + trailing zeros, e.g. 066350000000 for Waldeck-Frankenberg).

sources.title: OParl Council Information
sources.desc: Council information systems for German councils.

tools.name: getBodies
tools.desc: List the bodies (Koerperschaften) of a German council. Pick the council via the name enum; the vendor path style is resolved internally.

tools.name: getMeetings
tools.desc: List meetings (Sitzungen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, created/modified date filters. limit and reverse are applied client-side. The newest meetings are on the last page: read pagination.totalPages, then call with that page and reverse=true (where the server reports totals).

tools.name: getMeeting
tools.desc: Get a single meeting (Sitzung) by id, including its agenda items. Requires the council name and the meeting id.

tools.name: getPapers
tools.desc: List papers (Drucksachen) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getPaper
tools.desc: Get a single paper (Drucksache) by id, including reference, date and linked files. Requires the council name and the paper id.

tools.name: getPersons
tools.desc: List persons (members) of a council body, paginated. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getOrganizations
tools.desc: List organizations (Gremien, Fraktionen, Dienststellen) of a council body, paginated. Filter the returned data by organizationType. Optional bodyId (default 1), page, date filters. limit and reverse client-side.

tools.name: getAgendaItem
tools.desc: Get a single agenda item (Tagesordnungspunkt) by id, including its consultation and linked paper. Requires the council name and the agenda item id. Only available on OParl 1.1 endpoints (e.g. SD.NET RIM); not supported on ALLRIS 1.0.

sources.title: OpenPLZ Postal Directory
sources.desc: Postal codes and streets for DE / AT / CH.

tools.name: getGermanFederalStates
tools.desc: Returns all 16 German federal states (Bundeslaender) with their official keys and names.

tools.name: searchGermanLocalities
tools.desc: Search German localities by postal code or name. Returns locality, municipality, district, and federal state. For street-level data use searchGermanStreets. For combined search use germanFullTextSearch.

tools.name: searchGermanStreets
tools.desc: Search German streets by name, postal code, or locality. Returns street name with locality, municipality, district, and federal state context.

tools.name: germanFullTextSearch
tools.desc: Full-text search across German streets, postal codes, and localities. For structured queries use searchGermanLocalities or searchGermanStreets. For Austrian or Swiss data, use the country-specific tools.

tools.name: getAustrianProvinces
tools.desc: Returns all 9 Austrian federal provinces (Bundeslaender) with their official keys and names.

tools.name: searchAustrianLocalities
tools.desc: Search Austrian localities by postal code or name. Returns locality name, postal code, municipality, district, and federal province.

tools.name: getSwissCantons
tools.desc: Returns all 26 Swiss cantons with their official keys and names.

tools.name: searchSwissLocalities
tools.desc: Search Swiss localities by postal code or name. Returns locality name, postal code, commune, district, and canton.

sources.title: transport.rest Deutsche Bahn
sources.desc: Nationwide DB rail — stations, departures, journeys.

tools.name: searchLocations
tools.desc: Search for stations and addresses by name. Returns matching locations with coordinates, product availability (ICE, IC, regional, S-Bahn, bus), and station weight (importance). Use IDs from results in getNearbyLocations.

tools.name: getStop
tools.desc: Get detailed information about a specific stop/station by its IBNR ID including name, coordinates, available transport products, and connected lines. Use searchLocations first to find valid IDs.

tools.name: getDepartures
tools.desc: Get real-time departures from a station. Returns scheduled and real-time departure times, platform, line name, direction, and delay information for all transport modes.

tools.name: getArrivals
tools.desc: Get real-time arrivals at a station. Returns scheduled and actual arrival times, origin, platform, delay, and line information.

tools.name: planJourney
tools.desc: Plan a journey between two stations. IMPORTANT: from and to MUST be IBNR station IDs (e.g. 8000191 for Karlsruhe Hbf, 8011160 for Berlin Hbf). Use searchLocations first to get the IBNR. Do NOT pass city names. Set tickets=true for prices.

tools.name: getNearbyLocations
tools.desc: Find stops and stations near geographic coordinates. Returns nearby locations sorted by walking distance in meters.

tools.name: searchStations
tools.desc: Autocomplete DB station names using the db-stations dataset. Returns richer data than /locations including address, operator, category, and facilities.

tools.name: getTrip
tools.desc: Get detailed information about a specific trip including all stops, arrival/departure times, delays, and current position. The tripId is ephemeral (it encodes the service date) and must be taken from a recent getDepartures or planJourney result.

sources.title: Wikidata SPARQL
sources.desc: Structured knowledge graph via SPARQL.

tools.name: countriesByPopulation
tools.desc: List countries ranked by population. Returns country name, Wikidata ID, and population count ordered by population descending.

tools.name: citiesByCountry
tools.desc: List cities in a given country by Wikidata country ID (e.g. Q183 for Germany, Q30 for USA). Returns city names and optional population data.

tools.name: programmingLanguages
tools.desc: List programming languages with optional inception year and developer. Returns language names, Wikidata IDs, and metadata.

tools.name: universitiesByCountry
tools.desc: List universities in a given country by Wikidata country ID. Returns university names, founding dates, and locations.

tools.name: nobelLaureatesByYear
tools.desc: List Nobel Prize laureates for a given year. Returns names, prize category, and Wikidata references.

tools.name: querySparql
tools.desc: Execute a custom SPARQL query against the Wikidata knowledge graph. Full SPARQL 1.1 support with Wikidata-specific extensions like the label service.

sources.title: Gieß den Kiez (Tree Watering)
sources.desc: Berlin street trees, adoptions and waterings (CityLAB).

tools.name: getTrees
tools.desc: List Berlin street trees with optional filters. Filter by district (bezirk) or by a coordinate bounding box (latMin/latMax/lngMin/lngMax). Returns species, planting year, location and rainfall sum (radolan_sum). Use the PostgREST select to keep payloads small.

tools.name: getTreeById
tools.desc: Get the full record of a single tree by its cadastre id (e.g. 00008100:0037fcd1), including species, dimensions, owner, adoption/watering flags and the 365-day rainfall array (radolan_days).

tools.name: getAdoptedTrees
tools.desc: Return the aggregated adoption and watering status of all tracked trees. Each row gives a tree_id with adopted (1 if adopted) and watered (1 if recently watered) flags. Useful to find which trees citizens have taken care of.

tools.name: getWateredToday
tools.desc: List the trees that received water today, each with the total amount (in litres) poured. Reflects the live citizen watering activity in Berlin.

tools.name: getWateringsForTree
tools.desc: Return the full watering log of a single tree: every watering event with amount (litres), ISO-8601 timestamp and the username who watered it. Pass the tree cadastre id as t_id.

sources.title: DB Shared Mobility
sources.desc: Deutsche Bahn shared-mobility (GBFS) — needs a DB developer key.

tools.name: getGbfsDiscovery
tools.desc: Get the GBFS discovery feed listing all available data feeds and their URLs. Entry point for discovering available shared mobility data. Use getStationInformation for related data. Use getStationStatus for related data.

tools.name: getStationInformation
tools.desc: Get all shared mobility stations with location, name, capacity, and rental URIs. Call a Bike stations across Germany. Use getGbfsDiscovery for related data. Use getStationStatus for related data.

tools.name: getStationStatus
tools.desc: Get real-time status for all shared mobility stations. Returns number of available bikes, available docks, and whether the station is installed/renting/returning. Use getGbfsDiscovery for related data. Use getStationInformation for related data.

tools.name: getVehicleTypes
tools.desc: Get available vehicle types (bike types, e-bikes, cargo bikes etc.) with propulsion type, range, and form factor. Use getGbfsDiscovery for related data. Use getStationInformation for related data.

tools.name: getSystemInformation
tools.desc: Get system-level information about the shared mobility provider including name, operator, timezone, contact info, and supported features. Use getGbfsDiscovery for related data. Use getStationInformation for related data.

sources.title: Bundestag DIP
sources.desc: Parliamentary documents and protocols — needs a free DIP key.

tools.name: listDrucksachen
tools.desc: Search and list Drucksachen (printed papers) of the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period, date range, or title. Returns paginated results. Use getDrucksache for related data. Use listDrucksacheTexts for related data.

tools.name: getDrucksache
tools.desc: Get a single Drucksache (printed paper) by its ID from the German Bundestag. Returns full document details. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use listDrucksacheTexts for related data.

tools.name: listDrucksacheTexts
tools.desc: Search and list full texts of Drucksachen from the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period, date range, or title. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: getDrucksacheText
tools.desc: Get the full text of a single Drucksache by its ID from the German Bundestag. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: listPlenarprotokolle
tools.desc: Search and list Plenarprotokolle (plenary protocols) of the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period, date range, or title. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: getPlenarprotokoll
tools.desc: Get a single Plenarprotokoll (plenary protocol) by its ID from the German Bundestag. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: listPlenarprotokollTexts
tools.desc: Search and list full texts of Plenarprotokolle from the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period or date range. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: getPlenarprotokollText
tools.desc: Get the full text of a single Plenarprotokoll by its ID from the German Bundestag. Use listDrucksachen for related data. Use getDrucksache for related data.

tools.name: listVorgaenge
tools.desc: Search and list Vorgaenge (legislative proceedings) of the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period, date range, type, or descriptor. Use getVorgang for related data. Use listVorgangspositionen for related data.

tools.name: getVorgang
tools.desc: Get a single Vorgang (legislative proceeding) by its ID from the German Bundestag. Returns full proceeding details including related documents and activities. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use listVorgangspositionen for related data.

tools.name: listVorgangspositionen
tools.desc: Search and list Vorgangspositionen (proceeding positions) of the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period or date range. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

tools.name: getVorgangsposition
tools.desc: Get a single Vorgangsposition (proceeding position) by its ID from the German Bundestag. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

tools.name: listAktivitaeten
tools.desc: Search and list Aktivitaeten (parliamentary activities) of the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period, date range, person, or document type. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

tools.name: getAktivitaet
tools.desc: Get a single Aktivitaet (parliamentary activity) by its ID from the German Bundestag. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

tools.name: listPersonen
tools.desc: Search and list Personen (members of parliament) in the German Bundestag. Filter by legislative period or name. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

tools.name: getPerson
tools.desc: Get a single Person (member of parliament) by their ID from the German Bundestag. Returns full biographical and political details. Use listVorgaenge for related data. Use getVorgang for related data.

sources.title: Ticketmaster Discovery
sources.desc: Events, attractions and venues worldwide — needs a free Discovery API key.

tools.name: searchEvents
tools.desc: Search live events by keyword, city, country and classification (genre). Returns event records with name, dates, venues and price ranges. Use city=Berlin&countryCode=DE for Berlin large events.

tools.name: getEvent
tools.desc: Get full details for a single event by its Ticketmaster event id, including dates, venue, classifications, images and price ranges.

tools.name: searchAttractions
tools.desc: Search attractions (artists, sports teams, shows) by keyword. Returns attraction records with name, classifications and external links.

tools.name: getAttraction
tools.desc: Get full details for a single attraction (artist, team, show) by its Ticketmaster attraction id, including classifications, images and external links.

tools.name: searchVenues
tools.desc: Search venues by keyword, city and country. Returns venue records with name, address, location (latitude/longitude) and timezone.

tools.name: getVenue
tools.desc: Get full details for a single venue by its Ticketmaster venue id, including address, location (latitude/longitude), timezone and general info.

sources.title: OffeneRegister Companies
sources.desc: 5.3M German companies — local SQLite (FTS5), needs the bulk DB.

tools.name: searchCompany
tools.desc: Full-text search German companies by name (FTS5, column-scoped to the name). Returns company_number, name, status, address, federal state and registrar. Empty query: OFFREG-002.

tools.name: getCompany
tools.desc: Get a single German company by its unique company_number. Returns the full company row. Missing company_number: OFFREG-003. No match: OFFREG-004.

tools.name: searchOfficer
tools.desc: Full-text search company officers (Geschaeftsfuehrer, Prokuristen, Vorstand) by name (FTS5, column-scoped to the name). Returns name, position, dates and the linked company_number. Empty query: OFFREG-002.

tools.name: getCompanyOfficers
tools.desc: List all officers (current and former) of a company by its company_number, newest start_date first. Missing company_number: OFFREG-003.

tools.name: getCompanyRegistrations
tools.desc: List registration events (registration, subsequent-registration, alternate-registration ...) of a company by its company_number, newest publication_date first. Missing company_number: OFFREG-003.

sources.title: Geo Entry-Point
sources.desc: Canonical geocoding orchestrator — keyless lookups + local SQLite + keyed station depth.

tools.name: geoResolve
tools.desc: geo-resolve — dispatcher. Provide EXACTLY ONE of {latlon, address, placeName, postalCode, osmId}. Ambiguous (0 or >1) input is rejected (GEO-RESOLVE-001), never guessed. Returns a canonical Location.

tools.name: geoForward
tools.desc: geo-forward — geocode a free-form query or structured address (street/city/state/country/postalCode) to a point. Provider order (keyless first): Nominatim → OpenPLZ → Geoapify (key) → GeoNames (key). No hit: GEO-FWD-001; upstream chain fails: GEO-FWD-002; no usable input: GEO-FWD-003.

tools.name: geoReverse
tools.desc: geo-reverse (Handgriff 3) — reverse geocode lat/lon to an address. Snap hierarchy houseNumber → street → point. Meadow case: nearest house with snapDistanceMeters and lowered confidence. Order: Nominatim.reverse → local DB-POI / OpenPLZ. Overpass is NOT default. Unresolvable: GEO-REV-001.

tools.name: geoPostal
tools.desc: geo-postal — resolve a postal code to a locality and admin anchor. Order: OpenPLZ → Nominatim. No hit: GEO-PLZ-001.

tools.name: geoLookup
tools.desc: geo-lookup — look up an OSM object by id (N…/W…/R…) via Nominatim.lookup. No hit: GEO-LOOKUP-001.

tools.name: geoNearby
tools.desc: geo-nearby (Handgriff 2) — find features within radiusMeters of a point (location object OR lat/lon). Optional theme, timeRange (passed through), sources[]. Fans out over local SQLite (gtfs/overture); Overpass only when explicitly in sources[]. Results are normalised + deduped (PRD-F) into one FeatureCollection with _source and licence per feature.

tools.name: geoExtent
tools.desc: geo-extent — pure calculation. From lat/lon + radiusMeters (>0) + targetCrs + axisOrder compute a bounding box. No network call. radiusMeters <= 0: GEO-EXTENT-001. axisOrder is explicit (lonlat|latlon), never silently defaulted.

tools.name: geoTrails
tools.desc: geo-trails (Memo 122) — return German tourism trails (odta:Trail) as GeoJSON LineString features (RFC 7946, lon-first). Each route is a multi-vertex polyline (schema:geo -> schema:line, 290-1259 points) that follows the path bend-by-bend, so it renders as a real drawn line on a map. Optional name is a case-insensitive substring on the trail name. Bounded by limit (the graph has no spatial index; unbounded scans time out). Keyed: without OPEN_DATA_GERMANY_API_KEY this schema is disabled (the keyless geo tools stay available).

tools.name: geoNearbyDzt
tools.desc: geo-nearby-dzt (Memo 122) — DZT tourism entities (events, POIs, trails, lodging, food) within a radius around a point, as a lon-first GeoJSON FeatureCollection (circle-trimmed via Haversine; the graph has no GeoSPARQL). Optional types restricts to schema.org type names (comma list, e.g. TouristAttraction,Event). Optional enrich=transit attaches the nearest public-transit stop (_nearestTransitStop: DHID + walking distance) from the reified odta:GeoLinkObject. Keyed: disabled without OPEN_DATA_GERMANY_API_KEY (the keyless geoNearby sources:dzt path stays available).

tools.name: geoStation
tools.desc: geo-station (Memo 118) — depth pivot: resolve a German railway station from EXACTLY ONE selector {latlon, eva, dhid, bahnhofsnummer, name} to all five identifiers (bahnhofsnummer, EVA, DHID/IFOPT, AGS, RIL100) plus a canonical location, confidence and provenance. Keyed (DB StaDa + RIS::Stations); the dhid path bridges via the zHV registry. Without DB_CLIENT_ID/DB_API_KEY this schema is disabled (the keyless geo tools stay available). Ambiguous (0 or >1) selector input is rejected (GEO-STATION-001), never guessed. Optional opt-in enrich (comma list): elevators (FaSta lift state); departures is deferred (time-bound, flowmcp-grading#63).
